Interface IContingentValueEdit

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that edit a contingent value.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("1EA6DEB1-CFA8-495F-BDEF-CFB9B75C5130")]
public interface IContingentValueEdit : IContingentValue
